entry.title: Guy Hits His Nose on Ground While Sliding Down Wall on Skateboard

link.title: Guy Hits His Nose on Ground While Sliding Down Wall on Skateboard

entry.content: This guy wanted to try a drop trick with a skateboard. He stood over a wall to slide down its side. However, when he dropped with his skateboard, he couldn’t land properly and ended up hitting his nose on the ground.
entry.summary: This guy wanted to try a drop trick with a skateboard. He stood over a wall to slide down its side. However, when he dropped with his skateboard, he couldn’t land properly and ended up hitting his nose on the ground.

entry.title: Smarter Coronaschutz aus Japan: Diese Maske spricht acht Sprachen

link.title: Smarter Coronaschutz aus Japan: Diese Maske spricht acht Sprachen

entry.content: Ein japanisches Unternehmen hat ein smartes Zubehör für den gewöhnlichen Mund-Nasen-Schutz entwickelt. Die C-Face getaufte Maske verstärkt nicht nur das Gesagte, sondern dient gleichzeitig als Simultandolmetscher. Bisher kann die Erfindung acht Sprachen übersetzen.
entry.summary: Ein japanisches Unternehmen hat ein smartes Zubehör für den gewöhnlichen Mund-Nasen-Schutz entwickelt. Die C-Face getaufte Maske verstärkt nicht nur das Gesagte, sondern dient gleichzeitig als Simultandolmetscher. Bisher kann die Erfindung acht Sprachen übersetzen.

entry.title: Someone In California Was Just Diagnosed With The Plague

link.title: Someone In California Was Just Diagnosed With The Plague

entry.content:
A South Lake Tahoe resident has been diagnosed with the plague, yes… The Plague.
This marks the latest human case in California since 2015, according to CNN.
Health officials believe the person may have been bitten by an infected flea while walking their dog.
In recent decades, an average of seven cases of human plague have been reported each year in the US.
The range of diagnosis is between one to 17 cases per year, the CDC reports.
entry.summary: A South Lake Tahoe resident has been diagnosed with the plague, yes… The Plague. This marks the latest human case in California since 2015, according to CNN. Health officials believe the person may have been bitten by an infected flea while walking their dog. In recent decades, an average of seven cases of human plague have been reported each year in the US. The range of diagnosis is between one to 17 cases per year, the CDC reports.

link.title: SARAH PONCIO E JONATHAN COUTO: INFLUENCER APAGA FOTOS COM O MARIDO E FÃS ESPECULAM TÉRMINO (2020)

entry.content: #SarahPoncio e #JonathanCouto terminaram? O assunto desta terça-feira, 25, é a família Poncio - por conta de vários acontecimentos - os fãs começaram a especular um possível término entre o casal, calma aí, a CARAS vai te explicar o que aconteceu! Confira! #SauloPoncio

entry.title: Spitfire

link.title: Spitfire

entry.content: The public are now being offered the unique opportunity to nominate the name of a loved one that will be hand written onto the family-owned Aircraft Restoration Company’s blue photo-reconnaissance Spitfire to raise money for NHS Charities Together.
entry.summary: The public are now being offered the unique opportunity to nominate the name of a loved one that will be hand written onto the family-owned Aircraft Restoration Company’s blue photo-reconnaissance Spitfire to raise money for NHS Charities Together.

entry.title: Relance : deux milliards d’euros pour la Culture

link.title: Relance : deux milliards d’euros pour la Culture

entry.content:
Le Premier ministre Jean Castex a annoncé, mercredi 26 août, une aide de 2 milliards d’euros pour le secteur de la Culture. Il a précisé que l’État allait compenser les pertes de recettes. 
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Le Premier ministre Jean Castex a annoncé, mercredi 26 août, une aide de 2 milliards d’euros pour le secteur de la Culture. Il a précisé que l’État allait compenser les pertes de recettes. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Archana Puran Singh Share Behind The Scenes From Her Upcoming Film The Walk

link.title: Archana Puran Singh Share Behind The Scenes From Her Upcoming Film The Walk

entry.content: Alongside The Kapil Sharma Show, actor Archana Puran Singh has kickstarted her Bollywood film shoot, the actor recently shot the behind the scenes from the set, sharing the video, Archana wrote, "Behind the Scenes of a film shoot. Each time I go on a film set I feel both nervous and excited. But more nervous. I feel I won’t be able to act. I wonder "how did I act earlier? Ab toh nahin hoga". And then the first shot is canned. The director yells ok. And the exhilaration is euphoric. I tell myself : "You can act. Its ok!" I guess it’s like cycling. You can get rusty. But you never forget how. And you definitely don’t forget how it makes you feel. Film called ‘The Walk’ produced by @officialrahulroy."
entry.summary: Alongside The Kapil Sharma Show, actor Archana Puran Singh has kickstarted her Bollywood film shoot, the actor recently shot the behind the scenes from the set, sharing the video, Archana wrote, "Behind the Scenes of a film shoot. Each time I go on a film set I feel both nervous and excited. But more nervous. I feel I won’t be able to act. I wonder "how did I act earlier? Ab toh nahin hoga". And then the first shot is canned. The director yells ok. And the exhilaration is euphoric. I tell myself : "You can act. Its ok!" I guess it’s like cycling. You can get rusty. But you never forget how. And you definitely don’t forget how it makes you feel. Film called ‘The Walk’ produced by @officialrahulroy."

entry.title: Ciara Sotto talks about pole dancing and why it’s a legitimate sport

link.title: Ciara Sotto talks about pole dancing and why it’s a legitimate sport

entry.content:
Actress Ciara Sotto graces this episode of the Spin Sidelines to talk about pole dancing, which has finally gained recognition as a legitimate sport in the Philippines.
Full story:
entry.summary: Actress Ciara Sotto graces this episode of the Spin Sidelines to talk about pole dancing, which has finally gained recognition as a legitimate sport in the Philippines. Full story:

entry.title: Coronavirus Update : India में बढ़ा Recovery Rate, 24 घंटे में 62,000 मरीज़ हुए ठीक वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Coronavirus Update : India में बढ़ा Recovery Rate, 24 घंटे में 62,000 मरीज़ हुए ठीक वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
A good news has also come to light among the ever increasing cases of coronavirus in India .. So far, the figures of getting the most patients of corona in one day or the maximum number of deaths in a single day are coming out. But now India has also made a record of recovery from corona … Now the figures of people recovering from corona are also increasing. According to the figures of the Government of India, the country has created a new record of the number of people who beat Corona in a day. In the last 24 hours, 62 thousand 282 people undergoing treatment for corona in India have been discharged from the hospital.
भारत में कोरोनावायरस के लगातार बढ़ते मामलों को बीच एक अच्छी खबर भी सामने आई है.. अब तक एक दिन में कोरोना के सबसे ज्यादा मरीज मिलने या एक दिन में सबसे ज्यादा मौतों का ही रिकॉर्ड बनने के आंकड़े सामने आ रहे हैं. लेकिन अब भारत ने कोरोना से रिकवरी का भी रिकॉर्ड बनाया है… अब कोरोना से ठीक होने वाले लोगों का आंकड़े भी बढ़ रहा है. भारत सरकार के आंकड़ों के मुताबिक देश ने एक दिन में कोरोना को मात देने वाले लोगों की संख्या का नया रिकॉर्ड बनाया है. पिछले 24 घंटे में भारत में कोरोना का इलाज करा रहे 62 हजार 282 लोगों को अस्पताल से डिस्चार्ज किया गया है
#Coronavirus #Covid19
entry.summary: A good news has also come to light among the ever increasing cases of coronavirus in India .. So far, the figures of getting the most patients of corona in one day or the maximum number of deaths in a single day are coming out. But now India has also made a record of recovery from corona … Now the figures of people recovering from corona are also increasing. According to the figures of the Government of India, the country has created a new record of the number of people who beat Corona in a day. In the last 24 hours, 62 thousand 282 people undergoing treatment for corona in India have been discharged from the hospital. भारत में कोरोनावायरस के लगातार बढ़ते मामलों को बीच एक अच्छी खबर भी सामने आई है.. अब तक एक दिन में कोरोना के सबसे ज्यादा मरीज मिलने या एक दिन में सबसे ज्यादा मौतों का ही रिकॉर्ड बनने के आंकड़े सामने आ रहे हैं. लेकिन अब भारत ने कोरोना से रिकवरी का भी रिकॉर्ड बनाया है… अब कोरोना से ठीक होने वाले लोगों का आंकड़े भी बढ़ रहा है. भारत सरकार के आंकड़ों के मुताबिक देश ने एक दिन में कोरोना को मात देने वाले लोगों की संख्या का नया रिकॉर्ड बनाया है. पिछले 24 घंटे में भारत में कोरोना का इलाज करा रहे 62 हजार 282 लोगों को अस्पताल से डिस्चार्ज किया गया है #Coronavirus #Covid19

entry.title: HUMBERTO MARTINS ABRE O CORAÇÃO SOBRE ‘TOTALMENTE DEMAIS’ E ÉPOCA DOS “DESCAMISADOS”!

entry.content: #HumbertoMartins bateu um papo super legal com a gente! O galã contou sobre sua experiência em #TotalmenteDemais, revelou que é uma das obras que lembra com mais carinho e ainda comentou sobre o grupo dos #Descamisados!

entry.title: Sonia Gandhi holds virtual meeting with CMs

link.title: Sonia Gandhi holds virtual meeting with CMs

entry.content:
Congress interim president Sonia Gandhi held a virtual meeting on Wednesday with chief ministers of Congress-ruled states and their counterparts of West Bengal, Maharashtra and Jharkhand. The virtual meeting was convened to discuss several key issues such as the row over NEET/JEE exams,the Covid-19 situation in the country and GST compensation to states.
#NEET #JEEExams #COVID19 #GST #Jharkhand #SoniaGandhi #Congress
entry.summary: Congress interim president Sonia Gandhi held a virtual meeting on Wednesday with chief ministers of Congress-ruled states and their counterparts of West Bengal, Maharashtra and Jharkhand. The virtual meeting was convened to discuss several key issues such as the row over NEET/JEE exams,the Covid-19 situation in the country and GST compensation to states. #NEET #JEEExams #COVID19 #GST #Jharkhand #SoniaGandhi #Congress

entry.title: ‘Long-Haulers’ Experience Health Problems Long After ‘Recovering’ From COVID-19

link.title: ‘Long-Haulers’ Experience Health Problems Long After ‘Recovering’ From COVID-19

entry.content:
People known as ‘long-haulers,’ are those living with lingering COVID-19 symptoms. Considered to be medically recovered, they’re still not well.
The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention says many patients still have symptoms for up to five months after they’re considered recovered.
Most commonly, long-haulers continue to have shortness of breath, a cough, and chest tightness–especially patients who were ventilated.
Crashing fatigue is another common challenge, as are brain fog, memory problems, and hearing problems.
Finally, heart problems in various forms can also be experienced, due to the trauma inflicted on the organ by the COVID-19 virus.
entry.summary: People known as ‘long-haulers,’ are those living with lingering COVID-19 symptoms. Considered to be medically recovered, they’re still not well. The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention says many patients still have symptoms for up to five months after they’re considered recovered. Most commonly, long-haulers continue to have shortness of breath, a cough, and chest tightness–especially patients who were ventilated. Crashing fatigue is another common challenge, as are brain fog, memory problems, and hearing problems. Finally, heart problems in various forms can also be experienced, due to the trauma inflicted on the organ by the COVID-19 virus.

entry.title: La grippe porcine africaine sonne-t-elle le glas des sangliers nains ?

link.title: La grippe porcine africaine sonne-t-elle le glas des sangliers nains ?

entry.content:
Ces sangliers – les plus petits et les plus rares du monde – sont aujourd’hui en quarantaine. Le but : empêcher la disparition de l’espèce que pourrait entraîner la grippe porcine africaine.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Peringatan HUT RI Ke 75 Di Kabupaten Karangasem

link.title: Peringatan HUT RI Ke 75 Di Kabupaten Karangasem

entry.content:
Karangasem, KOMPASTV - Upacara bendera peringatan hut republik indonesia di kabupaten karangasem di pimpin bupati karangasem i gusti ayu mas sumatri sebagai inspektur upacara, acara peringatan hari kemerdekaan ri kali ini terlihat berbeda dari tahun sebelumnya, dimana peserta upacara di batasi dan tetap menerapkan protokol kesehatan
Turut juga hadir wakil bupati karangasem I Wayan Artha Dipa ketua DPRD , DANDIM 1623/karangasem santosa , KAPOLRES karangasem ,hingga sekda kab. karangasem I Ketut Sedana Merta /
Bupati karangasem berharap pada perayaan HUT RI ini bencana covid 19 bisa segera berakhir sehingga masyarakat bisa beraktivitas normal serta roda perekonomian kabupaten karangasem bisa kebali pulih/
Setelah upacara bendera bupati karangasem juga menyerahkan potongan masa tahanan bagi 112 narapidana lapas dewasa dan 13 orang lemaga pembinaan anak lp kelas ii b karangasem
Para napi yang mendapatkan remisi adalah mereka yang berkelaukan baik selama berada di dalam lapas , dan sudah memenuhi kriteria sesuai undang-undang yang berlaku
#HUT #RIke75 #Kemerdekaan #karangasem #bali #17agustus
entry.summary: Karangasem, KOMPASTV - Upacara bendera peringatan hut republik indonesia di kabupaten karangasem di pimpin bupati karangasem i gusti ayu mas sumatri sebagai inspektur upacara, acara peringatan hari kemerdekaan ri kali ini terlihat berbeda dari tahun sebelumnya, dimana peserta upacara di batasi dan tetap menerapkan protokol kesehatan Turut juga hadir wakil bupati karangasem I Wayan Artha Dipa ketua DPRD , DANDIM 1623/karangasem santosa , KAPOLRES karangasem ,hingga sekda kab. karangasem I Ketut Sedana Merta / Bupati karangasem berharap pada perayaan HUT RI ini bencana covid 19 bisa segera berakhir sehingga masyarakat bisa beraktivitas normal serta roda perekonomian kabupaten karangasem bisa kebali pulih/ Setelah upacara bendera bupati karangasem juga menyerahkan potongan masa tahanan bagi 112 narapidana lapas dewasa dan 13 orang lemaga pembinaan anak lp kelas ii b karangasem Para napi yang mendapatkan remisi adalah mereka yang berkelaukan baik selama berada di dalam lapas , dan sudah memenuhi kriteria sesuai undang-undang yang berlaku #HUT #RIke75 #Kemerdekaan #karangasem #bali #17agustus

entry.title: Hong Kong’s iconic State Theatre to be preserved under multibillion-dollar redevelopment plan

link.title: Hong Kong’s iconic State Theatre to be preserved under multibillion-dollar redevelopment plan

entry.content: The “essence” of Hong Kong’s iconic State Theatre will be preserved as the site where it stands undergoes a multibillion-dollar redevelopment project. New World Development agreed to retain the 68-year-old theatre in North Point because of its historical value, and in turn won government approval to acquire pieces of property around the site that it had been trying to buy.
entry.summary: The “essence” of Hong Kong’s iconic State Theatre will be preserved as the site where it stands undergoes a multibillion-dollar redevelopment project. New World Development agreed to retain the 68-year-old theatre in North Point because of its historical value, and in turn won government approval to acquire pieces of property around the site that it had been trying to buy.

entry.title: RTI reveals government’s ventilator scam

link.title: RTI reveals government’s ventilator scam

entry.content:
Ventilators for COVID-19 treatment ordered by the Indian government from a Gujarat-based firm called Jyoti CNC Automation had not received a recommendation from a technical committee set up by the health ministry’s Directorate General of Health Services (DGHS) as of July 20, according to documents obtained through the Right to Information (RTI) Act.
#COVID19 #Coronavirus #RTIAct #CNC #DGHS #Gujrat
entry.summary: Ventilators for COVID-19 treatment ordered by the Indian government from a Gujarat-based firm called Jyoti CNC Automation had not received a recommendation from a technical committee set up by the health ministry’s Directorate General of Health Services (DGHS) as of July 20, according to documents obtained through the Right to Information (RTI) Act. #COVID19 #Coronavirus #RTIAct #CNC #DGHS #Gujrat

entry.title: Sushant Death Case: Rhea Chakraborty claims ‘threat to life’, seeks police protection Oneindia News

link.title: Sushant Death Case: Rhea Chakraborty claims ‘threat to life’, seeks police protection Oneindia News

entry.content:
With claims and allegations flying thick and strong against actor Rhea Chakraborty and Sushant Singh Rajput case taking a new turn everyday, Now Rhea Chakraborty took to social media to show the crowd gathered inside her building compound. She asked the Mumbai police to provide them with protection as she feels there is a threat to her and her family. Rhea shared a video of her father Indrajit Chakraborty entering the building premise when a huge crowd of people surround him immediately. she said that she and her family have been trying to get out of her house to cooperate with the ED, CBI and other authorities. She said that there is a threat to her life and have informed the local police station but nobody helped.
#SushantDeathCase
entry.summary: With claims and allegations flying thick and strong against actor Rhea Chakraborty and Sushant Singh Rajput case taking a new turn everyday, Now Rhea Chakraborty took to social media to show the crowd gathered inside her building compound. She asked the Mumbai police to provide them with protection as she feels there is a threat to her and her family. Rhea shared a video of her father Indrajit Chakraborty entering the building premise when a huge crowd of people surround him immediately. she said that she and her family have been trying to get out of her house to cooperate with the ED, CBI and other authorities. She said that there is a threat to her life and have informed the local police station but nobody helped. #SushantDeathCase
